 The Thonet 18 chair is one of the famous curved chair models of the Thonet brand, considered a symbol of European interior design from the 19th century. With its classic beauty, elegance and timeless quality, this chair model quickly became a favorite choice in cafes, restaurants and living spaces with Vintage Classic Retro style. Today, the Thonet 18 ash wood chair model still retains its aesthetic value but has been improved in terms of material, durability and finishing, suitable for modern decor trends.
